heroAlt: A collaborative team standing around a project board
section1: Our team provides expert guidance to organizations in developing and implementing CSR strategies, sustainability initiatives, and impact-driven programs.
section1b: We support companies in navigating the complexities of CSR reporting, impact analysis, and Social Return on Investment (SROI).
section1c: Our expertise extends to developing robust Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) frameworks and sustainability assessments using EFQM, Corporate Responsibility Index, and ISO 26000.
section1d: We also develop sustainability reports aligned with Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) guidelines and UN Global Compact principles.
certifications: ISSP-SA – International Society of Sustainability Professionals
Competent Leader & Competent Communicator – Toastmasters International
experience: With more than four decades of combined experience, our team brings deep expertise in advisory, training, and research across Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and sustainability.
experience2: We work closely with organizations from early program development through implementation and impact measurement, ensuring long-term community benefits.
